posts.author: jos (joshua kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I thought it would be great to have a feature to share files with clients without having to have them create an account or anything. We upload files as designers, but then management has to re-upload these to dropbox or something. I saw a paid plugin that does this, but this seems like something that would be better left to the development team of monday. It also is something that makes sense as a feature. But thats just my opinion.
Thanks!

posts.author: Yoggie (Yogev David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jos !

I this answers your question.

Also, you might find other useful tools here.
